recommendations.title: American Graffiti
recommendations.overview: A couple of high school graduates spend one final night cruising the strip with their buddies before they go off to college.

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith
recommendations.overview: When the sinister Sith unveil a thousand-year-old plot to rule the galaxy, the Republic crumbles and from its ashes rises the evil Galactic Empire. Jedi hero Anakin Skywalker must choose a side.

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace
recommendations.overview: Anakin Skywalker, a young slave strong with the Force, is discovered on Tatooine. Meanwhile, the evil Sith have returned, enacting their plot for revenge against the Jedi.

recommendations.title: Star Wars
recommendations.overview: Princess Leia is captured and held hostage by the evil Imperial forces in their effort to take over the galactic Empire. Venturesome Luke Skywalker and dashing captain Han Solo team together with the loveable robot duo R2-D2 and C-3PO to rescue the b

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
recommendations.overview: Following an assassination attempt on Senator Padmé Amidala, Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi investigate a mysterious plot into the heart of the Separatist movement and the beginning of the Clone Wars.

recommendations.title: The Cutting Edge: The Magic of Movie Editing
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the art of film editing. Clips are shown from many groundbreaking films with innovative editing styles.

recommendations.title: Artificial Paradises
recommendations.overview: Nando and Erika, two young people in their twenties, meet several times without noticing. The story of the subculture of electronic music and rave parties and drugs like MDMA.

recommendations.title: The Apostle
recommendations.overview: After his happy life spins out of control, a preacher from Texas changes his name, goes to Louisiana and starts preaching on the radio.

recommendations.title: Falling Down
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

recommendations.title: Anomalisa
recommendations.overview: An inspirational speaker becomes reinvigorated after meeting a lively woman who shakes up his mundane existence.
